gameDetails.removeTimeConfirmation: Are you sure you want to remove the date and time for this game?

participantsOnlyChat.title: Participants-only chat
participantsOnlyChat.description: Create separate chats for playing participants and organizers.
participantsOnlyChat.confirmMessage: This will create the {{participantsChat}} and {{adminsChat}} chats for this game.

locationTime.partialSaveFailed: Some changes were saved, but {{step}} could not be updated. Review and try again.
locationTime.unlinkNoCancelHint: The court reservation at the club stays active — we only remove the link from this game.
locationTime.unlinkSaveConfirmMessage: You are unlinking {{count}} reservation(s) from this game. The real court bookings will not be cancelled automatically.

linkedBookings.refreshStillActive: Reservation is still active in your club account
linkedBookings.refreshCheckFailed: Could not check reservation status. Try again.
linkedBookings.absentMessage: This court reservation is no longer in your club account. We will remove the link from this game. Your game stays on the calendar.
linkedBookings.absentMessageOtherGames: This reservation is also linked to {{count}} other game(s) — only this game will be updated here.

liveScoring.serveRotationOfficialDesc: Super tie-break (STB) rules: your first server plays one point, then teams take turns with two points each—the same player serves Serve 1 (right) and Serve 2 (left). Change ends after every six points total.
liveScoring.serveRotationSimpleDesc: Like a classic game: one point from the right, one from the left, then your partner serves.
liveScoring.chooseDeciderFormat: Choose how to play the deciding set.
liveScoring.deciderSubtitle: The match is tied at one set all. Pick the third set format before scoring.
liveScoring.timedLockCta: Lock set at current score (timer stopped)
liveScoring.timedScoringFrozen: Scoring locked at current score (timer stopped)
liveScoring.pickleballKitchenFaultHint: Honor system only — score is unchanged. Agree with your group and tap the other team to award the point.
liveScoring.pickleballUnderhandServeHint: Coach hint: serve must be underhand with contact below the waist. Diagonal into the opposite service court only. Honor system — score unchanged.
liveScoring.pickleballSideOutHint: Coach hint: in side-out scoring only the serving team can score; when they lose the rally, serve passes to the opponents. This board uses rally points — tap either team to score.
liveScoring.pickleballTwoBounceHint: Coach hint: return must bounce once before volley; serve must bounce on each side. Honor system — score unchanged.
liveScoring.letHint: Honor system — replay the point with your group. Score unchanged.
liveScoring.serviceFaultHint: Honor system — award the point to the receiver. Tap their side to score.
liveScoring.strictLetPending: Let called — replay the point before scoring.
liveScoring.strictServeSideMismatch: Serve court does not match the score (strict mode). Check the serve coach.

gameDetails.calendarError: Failed to add event to calendar
gameDetails.deleteGameConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this game? This action cannot be undone.

deleteWithBookings.title: Court reservations stay active
deleteWithBookings.messageGame: Deleting this game won't cancel your club court reservations listed below. They'll remain in your club account — cancel them there if you no longer need them.
deleteWithBookings.messageTournament: Deleting this tournament won't cancel your club court reservations listed below. They'll remain in your club account — cancel them there if you no longer need them.
deleteWithBookings.messageLeague: Deleting this league won't cancel your club court reservations listed below. They'll remain in your club account — cancel them there if you no longer need them.
deleteWithBookings.messageLeagueSeason: Deleting this league season won't cancel your club court reservations listed below. They'll remain in your club account — cancel them there if you no longer need them.
deleteWithBookings.messageBar: Deleting this bar won't cancel your club court reservations listed below. They'll remain in your club account — cancel them there if you no longer need them.
deleteWithBookings.messageTraining: Deleting this training won't cancel your club court reservations listed below. They'll remain in your club account — cancel them there if you no longer need them.

gameDetails.notPlayingHint: You are not playing, but you are still a participant in the chat. You can leave the chat instead.
gameDetails.notPlayingHintGame:
• You are a participant in the chat.
• You can rejoin the game, but you can't be invited again until you leave the chat too.
• If you leave the chat, the game will be removed from 'my games' section and you will need an invitation or wait in queue to rejoin the game.
gameDetails.notPlayingHintTournament:
• You are a participant in the chat.
• You can rejoin the tournament, but you can't be invited again until you leave the chat too.
• If you leave the chat, the tournament will be removed from 'my games' section and you will need an invitation or wait in queue to rejoin the tournament.

gameDetails.ownerCannotLeave:

• Or delete the game.

gameDetails.deleteRoundConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this round? This action cannot be undone.
gameDetails.restartPlayoffConfirmation: This will delete the entire bracket and all scheduled matchup games. You can create a new playoff from scratch.
gameDetails.sendStartMessageConfirmation: Are you sure you want to send the start message? This action cannot be undone and you will not be able to resend it again.
gameDetails.participantsSynced: Participants synced with the season game
gameDetails.groupOrderDescription: Groups are ordered from best to worst. The first group is the best, the last is the worst.

gameDetails.bothTeamsNeedTwoPlayers: Both teams need exactly two players

gameDetails.fixtureDetailNoDatetimeFinal: Date and venue were not recorded for this match.
gameDetails.fixtureTableModeRegularOnly: Table view shows the regular season only.

gameDetails.fixtureFullRrDisabledExisting: Delete existing regular season rounds first
gameDetails.recreateSeasonTableConfirmation: Unscheduled matches (no time, venue, or results) will be removed. Scheduled and completed matches are kept. The table will be rebuilt as a single round-robin. Continue?

recreateSummary.roundsSkipped: {{count}} extra rounds kept (games could not be removed)

gameDetails.bracketCustomPlayInHint: Choose which seeds face each other in play-in (advanced).
gameDetails.bracketCustomPlayInErrorCount: Select pairings for every play-in match.
gameDetails.bracketCustomPlayInErrorDuplicate: Each seed can appear in only one play-in match.
gameDetails.bracketCustomPlayInErrorByeSeed: Bye seeds cannot be in a play-in pairing.
gameDetails.bracketCustomPlayInErrorInvalidPair: A team cannot play itself in play-in.
gameDetails.bracketAdvancedOptionsGateHint: Finish participant selection to unlock bracket structure and advanced options.
gameDetails.bracketSeedingOrderPreview: Global seed order from your preset.
gameDetails.bracketSeedingManualTapHint: Tap a team, then tap where it should go. Or use arrows.
gameDetails.bracketThirdPlaceMatchHint: Semifinal losers play one extra match for bronze.
gameDetails.bracketConsolationBracketHint: First-round knockout losers play a separate mini-bracket.
gameDetails.bracketDoubleEliminationHint: Losers drop to a second bracket; grand final if winners-bracket champion loses once.
gameDetails.bracketGameSetupBlindAdvanceWarn: Review match format before continuing — defaults apply to every bracket game.
gameDetails.bracketWalkoverConfirmMessage: Award a walkover to this participant? The match will be marked final and the winner will advance.
gameDetails.bracketWalkoverErrorForbidden: Only league owners and admins can award walkovers.
gameDetails.bracketWalkoverErrorBye: Cannot award a walkover on a bye slot.
gameDetails.bracketWalkoverErrorNoAdvance: This slot has no advancement target.
gameDetails.bracketWalkoverErrorInvalidWinner: That team is not in this bracket tree.
gameDetails.bracketWalkoverErrorNotContestant: The winner must be a contestant in this match.
gameDetails.bracketWalkoverErrorPlayInGate: Complete all play-in games before knockout walkovers.
gameDetails.bracketWalkoverErrorIncompleteSlot: Both contestants must be known for a walkover on this slot.
gameDetails.bracketWalkoverErrorIncompleteTeams: Match teams are incomplete for walkover.
gameDetails.bracketWalkoverErrorNotFound: Bracket slot or game not found.
gameDetails.bracketOfflineAction: Connect to the internet to update the bracket.
gameDetails.bracketSeedingLockedHint: Seeding is locked — slot edits are disabled until you unlock.
gameDetails.bracketCustomByesHint: Pick exactly {{count}} seed numbers that receive a bye.
gameDetails.bracketCustomByesErrorCount: Select exactly as many bye seeds as there are byes.
gameDetails.bracketCustomByesErrorDuplicate: Each bye seed must be unique.
gameDetails.bracketCustomByesErrorRange: Bye seeds must be between 1 and the team count.
gameDetails.bracketNotifySummaryErrorForbidden: Only league owners and admins can send the bracket summary.
gameDetails.bracketNotifySummaryErrorNoChampion: The bracket champion is not determined yet.
gameDetails.bracketScrollHint: Scroll sideways to see the full bracket
gameDetails.bracketEmpty: No bracket data for this group yet.
gameDetails.bracketEmptyNoSlots: This group's bracket has no match slots yet.
gameDetails.bracketLoadError: Could not load the playoff bracket.
gameDetails.bracketLoadErrorHint: Check your connection and try again.
gameDetails.bracketAllGroupsNote: Showing the bracket for '{{groupName}}'. Pick a group above to switch.
gameDetails.bracketListKnockoutGateEmpty: Knockout games appear after all play-in matches are complete.
gameDetails.bracketListEmpty: No games in this filter yet.
gameDetails.bracketListFallbackHint: Prefer a simple list? Use the list view instead of the tree.
gameDetails.bracketEditHint: Tap one team, then another to swap. Play-in teams only with play-in; knockout only within the same round.
gameDetails.bracketEditNothingEditable: No placements can be edited (results may already be final).
gameDetails.bracketEditErrorOrder: Could not load seed order for editing.
gameDetails.bracketEditErrorInvalidSwap: You can only swap within play-in or within the same knockout round.
gameDetails.bracketEditErrorFinalSubtree: Cannot edit: a match in this branch already has final results.
gameDetails.bracketEditErrorInvalidBye: Invalid change: bye teams cannot be moved into play-in slots.
gameDetails.bracketEditErrorNotImplemented: Bracket editing is not available on the server yet.
gameDetails.bracketEditErrorForbidden: Only league owners and admins can edit the bracket.
gameDetails.bracketEditErrorPlayInLocked: Play-in results are final; seeding is locked.
gameDetails.bracketEditErrorKnockoutLocked: This knockout round has final results; seeding is locked.
gameDetails.bracketEditErrorGameFinal: Cannot edit teams on a finalized game.
gameDetails.bracketEditErrorInvalidSlot: One or more bracket slots are invalid.
gameDetails.bracketPlayInGateHint: Finish all play-in matches before focusing on the knockout bracket.
gameDetails.fixtureMatrixAllGroupsNote: Showing the fixture table for '{{groupName}}'. Pick a group above to switch.

planner.legendFree: Free — at least partial availability in this period.
planner.legendBusy: Busy — availability set and this period is off.
planner.legendMatch: Match fit — emerald ring: an unscheduled regular fixture can work here (both sides available, no conflicting booked games in this period).
planner.peopleCountsNone: No one with saved availability in this slot.
planner.matchesNone: No unscheduled matches fit this slot.
planner.plannerLoginHint: Sign in to load the planner.
